reasoning:
Choo Kyung-ho faced an arrest warrant request from a special counsel in late November 2025 regarding the December 2024 martial law incident. He underwent an arrest warrant hearing on December 2, 2025, and was held at the Seoul Detention Center while awaiting the result. On December 3, 2025, the court rejected the arrest warrant, and he was released. The resolution criteria explicitly state: "Temporary holding at a facility, such as the Seoul Detention Center, while awaiting a judge’s decision on whether to grant a detention warrant, does not qualify." Furthermore, on December 7, 2025, prosecutors formally indicted Choo without physical detention. 

Since he has been indicted without physical detention, the chance of him being jailed under a new court-ordered warrant or receiving a prison sentence within the final 10 days of 2025 is effectively zero. Polymarket traders priced this at 0.01 on December 11 following his indictment, which makes 0.02 (our lower bound limit) the most accurate and precise estimate.
